title: [CI:DOCS] swagger: update system version response body
body:
This change updates the swagger documentation of the
system version response body to match with the actual
response.

Fixes: #9522
Signed-off-by: Tristan Cacqueray <tdecacqu@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Test-checker is angry. Recommend you add `[CI:DOCS]` to the title and force-push to fix CI.

Otherwise LGTM.
/approve
